Weekly Blog

Week #20 - December 29th-January 5th

December 29, 2025

Our BPA outreach at Freshman Night was a big success. We had so many students sign up that we ran out of posters! Seeing new faces excited about business and technology reinvigorates our club and reminds me why leadership is important.

The snow break also gave me extra time to work on the board for my plant electrophysiology science fair project. Fine‑tuning the visuals and narrative has strengthened my understanding of the data and honed my ability to communicate complex information clearly.

Throughout these experiences, I’m noticing growth in both my leadership and technical abilities. Leading BPA initiatives while delving deeper into engineering projects has helped me identify what kind of engineering work energizes me. Each project brings me closer to understanding my long‑term direction.
